data.name: Femboy Wants To Be Mayor
data.detailed_description:
Goodbye Dictatorship, Hello Fabulous!

Valeria rules the city with an iron fist—exploiting resources, claiming every corner for herself, and leaving the people with nothing. But the winds of change are blowing! The most colorful, brave, and stylish candidate the city has ever seen is stepping into the spotlight.

Get ready for a seamless visual novel experience.

  • Manage Your Election Campaign: Visit key city locations including churches, bars, universities, and dormitories to interact with the public.

  • Gather Votes: Gain the trust of different communities in each district and increase your polling numbers before election day.

Gather Your Crew, Win the Election! This isn't just a battle of ballots; it's a fight for freedom. Stand against Valeria’s corrupt system alongside your loyal team:

  • Minsu: The mastermind of strategy and intellect.

  • Riley: Representing the energy of the streets and the voice of the people.

  • Mira: The unsung hero of logistics and organization.

  • Ling: The favorite of undecided voters with peak diplomacy and persuasion skills.

    ---

  • The Ultimate Race Against a Dictator: Achieve the impossible against the ruthless Dictator Valeria, who controls all state resources, media, and power.

  • Outsmart Rigged Elections: Navigate through Valeria's dirty tactics, ballot manipulation, and oppression. Overthrow a corrupt system with a fresh vision (or your own clever schemes)!

  • Win the Hearts and Votes of the People: Reach every district, listen to the citizens' struggles, and win their loyalty by promising back the resources Valeria has exploited.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 保加利亞文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 繁體中文, 日文, 韓文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 波蘭文, 匈牙利文, 挪威文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 希臘文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 南非文, 印地語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 / AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 / 1 GB VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.15 (Catalina)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or Apple M1/M2/M3 chip
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal-capable GPU (Integrated Intel HD 6000 or Apple Silicon GPU)
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.15 (Catalina) or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or Apple M1/M2/M3 chip
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal-capable GPU (Integrated Intel HD 6000 or Apple Silicon GPU)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0+ or Vulkan compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0+ or Vulkan compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
